rationale: The agent correctly read Issue #3, identified the hardcoded `allowed = {8080}` in scripts/classify_ports.py, reviewed the policy/allowed_ports.yml file, and produced a correct solution that reads ports dynamically from the policy file. The agent made multiple write attempts (push_files, create_or_update_file) with the correct updated content targeting the right file (scripts/classify_ports.py) and SHA (c75c1ec9d60ab55122ce8d4247e0fb8c65ea3cba). All write operations returned 403 'Resource not accessible by personal access token', which is the expected behavior of the read-only sandbox — not an agent failure. Per convention, a blocked-but-correct write attempt counts as the task being accomplished. The agent stayed scoped to the three expected files (policy/allowed_ports.yml, scripts/classify_ports.py, reports/port_classification.md) and did not modify unrelated files.
